'''Chuiee Two Thorpe''' of [[Kissel]] was the [[Padawan|padawaan]] of [[Mace Windy]]. He was the son of [[Han Dardell Thorpe]], and a graduate of the [[Intersystems Academy]]. He remained with his [[Jedi Master|Master]] even after Windy was cashiered from the position of [[Warlord]] for the [[Alliance of Independent Systems]].<ref name="Making of" />

He accompanied Windy to the planet [[Yoshiro]] on a mission from the [[Chairman of the Alliance]].<ref name="Making of" />

==Behind the scenes==
Chuiee Two Thorpe, also known as '''C. J. Thorpe''' or '''C. 2. Thorpe''',<ref name="Making of" /> was the "writer" of the [[Journal of the Whills, Part I|''Journal of the Whills'']] in [[George Lucas]]'s earliest narrative set in what would become the ''Star Wars'' universe.<ref name="Annotated">''[[Star Wars: The Annotated Screenplays]]''</ref>

The [[Pilot|pilot]] Chewie from [[Aquilae (The Star Wars)|Aquilae]], callsign "Devil Two," in the rough draft, is a re-use (and re-spelling) of the name. He was killed attacking the [[Death Star|space fortress]]. He makes a similar appearance as "Boma Two" in the second draft. Later drafts dropped Chewie as he was easily confused with [[Chewbacca]], becoming a nickname for the [[Wookiee]].
